plugins.name: Auto Detect Indention
plugins.description: Detects indention (tab or spaces) and auto adjust Tab key on-the-fly.
plugins.author: Mike Tzou (Chocobo1)

plugins.name: AutoSave
plugins.description:
Automatically save the currently open files based on a timer schedule and/or upon the application losing focus.
The plugin offers several options to save the current (or all the files), selecting only the named ones, accessible through an options dialog box.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Chinese Converter
plugins.description: Traditional and Simplified conversion plugin for Notepad++
plugins.author: lkk9898969

plugins.name: CollectionInterface
plugins.description:
Interface to the official UserDefinedLanguage Collection and nppThemes Collection.

Allows easy download and installation of a UDL (with FunctionList and AutoCompletion definitions, when available) or a Theme
plugins.author: pryrt

plugins.name: ComparePlus
plugins.description: Advanced compare tool based on the well-known Compare-plugin by Ty Landercasper and Jean-Sebastien Leroy.
plugins.author: Pavel Nedev

plugins.name: Dark Mode C
plugins.description: Adds toolbar icons to instantly switch between light and dark mode with no restart required. Features an automatic mode that dynamically toggles your theme based on local sunrise and sunset times.
plugins.author: pullitall

plugins.name: Discord Rich Presence
plugins.description: Shows in discord the file that is currently being edited in Notepad++.
plugins.author: Zukaritasu

plugins.name: Emoji Description
plugins.description: Displays detailed character encoding information in the status bar. Shows Unicode code point, decimal/hexadecimal values, HTML entity, and UTF-8 byte sequence for any character including emoji.
plugins.author: Ruberoid

plugins.name: Fixed-width Data Visualizer
plugins.description: Fixed Width Data Visualizer adds Excel-like features for fixed-width data files in Notepad++. Displays cursor position data. Foldable Record Blocks; Hop & Jump to specific fields. Field Copy & Field Paste. Data Extraction. Builtin dialogs to configure file-type, record-type & fields; and themes & colors. Automatic File Type Detection. Handles homogenous, mixed & multi-line records. Full Multi-byte character support. Darkmode enabled.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: GotoLineCol
plugins.description: A plugin to navigate to a specified line and (byte-based or character-based) column position. Will also display character byte code, UTF-8 byte sequence & Unicode code point, name & block at cursor position. Darkmode enabled. Command line options.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: HEX-Editor
plugins.description: Hex editor. Some reported issues, however many bugs fixed in latest release.
plugins.author: Jens Lorenz

plugins.name: HTML Tag
plugins.description:
Provides three core functions:
- HTML and XML tag jumping, like the built-in brace matching and selection
 of tags and/or contents.
- HTML entity encoding/decoding (example: é to é)
- JS character encoding/decoding (example: é to \u00E9)
plugins.author: Martijn Coppoolse

plugins.name: JSON Viewer
plugins.description: JSON viewer that displays the selected JSON string in a tree view.
plugins.author: Kapil Ratnani, Rajendra Singh

plugins.name: JSTool
plugins.description:
Javascript plugin.
 * Douglas Crockford's JSMin algorithm to minimize javascript code.
 * My own algorithm to format javascript code.
 * A JSON data viewer. This JSON data viewer can handle >10MB JSON file easily.
 * Support 64bit Notepad++ (from version 1.20.0).
Really helpful to javascript coder on Notepad++ and really easy to use it.
Made in China.
plugins.author: Sun Junwen

plugins.name: Language Selector
plugins.description:
Set the programming language and see the syntax highlighting on new files without the need to save them, or to go each time to the menu to choose the language.
You can also pin your favourite languages for quick access.
plugins.author: Abdellah Hassaine

plugins.name: LanguageHelp
plugins.description:
Allows loading a language specific help file (CHM, HLP, PDF) and search for the keyword under the cursor.
The latest version allows showing the help files as menu entries or in the context menu.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Linter++
plugins.description: Allows realtime code check against any checkstyle-compatible linter: jshint, eslint, jscs, phpcs, csslint, and many others.
plugins.author: Tom Tanner

plugins.name: Markdown Table Editor
plugins.description: Edits Markdown pipe tables as aligned text. Align, fit width, narrow or widen columns, navigate, insert, delete, move and sort rows or columns, convert CSV/TSV blocks, and insert new tables from Notepad++.
plugins.author: Kreout

plugins.name: MenuIcons
plugins.description: Adds icons to the main menu, tab menu, context menu, and the tabs themselves.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Mime tools
plugins.description: Implements several main functionalities defined in MIME (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions): Base64, Quoted-printable and URL encode/decode
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: MultiReplace
plugins.description: Multi-pattern search & replace across single or multiple files; reusable search & replace lists; CSV column operations (sort, delete, deduplicate); FlowTabs for visual column alignment; dockable search results; rectangular selection support; Lua/ExprTk formula engine with conditional and math logic.
plugins.author: Thomas Knoefel

plugins.name: NestedDSV Data Visualizer
plugins.description: Plugin for visualizing hierarchical (nested) delimiter-separated values (DSV) data in Notepad++. Displays cursor position data. Jumps to specific fields. Folding Record Blocks. Extracts Data. Builtin dialogs to configure file-type, record-type & fields; Themes & Colors; and Folding.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: Notepad++ bplist plugin
plugins.description: Supports viewing/editing binary plist files. Due to the fact that ordinary plist files have XML format, this plugin does not support them. It only loads binary plist files (bplist).
plugins.author: Sergiy Azarovsky

plugins.name: Notepad++ Plugin Demo
plugins.description: Notepad++ Plugin Demo is written from Notepad++ Plugin Template to demonstrate the usage of plugin API.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: Notepad++ Plugin Template
plugins.description: Template for making plugin development as easy and simple as possible. Four steps and it's done.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: Npp Converter
plugins.description: ASCII<->Hex converter.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: NppCrossCheck
plugins.description:
Compare two lists in the current document.
Place the two lists separated by one or more blank lines and run the plugin to cross-check their contents.
plugins.author: Pablo Lopez

plugins.name: NppExport
plugins.description: True WYSIWYG exporter. Allows you not only to save your source code as an HTML/RTF file, but also to copy your source code in the clipboard in RTF/HTML format, so you can paste it into your word processor (Openoffice.org Writer, LibreOffice Writer, Abiword, MS Word) to get the same visual effect.

plugins.name: NppFTP
plugins.description: Allows FTP, FTPS, FTPES, and SFTP communications. Very useful for web development.
plugins.author: ashish_kulz

plugins.name: NppJumpList
plugins.description: Adds Windows 7 jump list support.
plugins.author: ahvgeezer

plugins.name: NppNetNote
plugins.description: Allows the same document to be edited in real time on two different computers. Only needs a network connection between the two.
plugins.author: Harrybharry

plugins.name: NppTextViz
plugins.description: Hide or show lines to help analyse larger files - logs for example. Can hide all lines that contain text pattern. Or simply select several lines and hide them. Based on TextFX plugin v0.25 by Chris Severance.
plugins.author: Jakub Dvorak

plugins.name: NppVim
plugins.description: A Notepad++ plugin that adds Vim-style editing and key bindings.
plugins.author: h-jangra

plugins.name: OpenSelection
plugins.description: Open files based on the selected text. A typical applications is 'include' files of may types of programs. Another applications is to open Matlab functions. Can be customized for different languages based on the open file extension. Multiple search folders may be specified along with multiple extensions.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Pork to Sausage
plugins.description: Pass any selected text to any command line program as input and take the output (the result of program) to replace the selected text.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: RAScript
plugins.description: Notepad++ plugin to define RAScript grammar
plugins.author: Joshua Raphael

plugins.name: RunMe
plugins.description: Execute the currently open file, based on its shell association. Also allows opening an explorer or command shell at the file location. Options are available to save the current file (or all files) before execution. The executed file can be run in foreground, background, or hidden mode. Context menu entries and tool bar icons are available.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: rustnpp
plugins.description: Rust plugin to run or build cargo project and run or build *.rs files. Requisite Rust installation.
plugins.author: nika-begiashvili

plugins.name: SecurePad
plugins.description: Encrypt/decrypt whole documents or selected text with your own key. Useful for storing sensitive information like logins that you don't want lying around in a plaintext file.
plugins.author: Dominic Tobias

plugins.name: Select N' Launch
plugins.description: Get the selected text, save it as file with the extension you customized in the system temporary directory, then call system to open it with the extension-associated program.
plugins.author: Don HO

plugins.name: Select to Clipboard
plugins.description: Auto copy selected text to clipboard. You can automatically copy selected text like in PuTTY (or similar) terminal application.
plugins.author: Jakub Dvorak

plugins.name: Session Manager
plugins.description: Session manager. IMPORTANT: If you are upgrading from a version older than 1.2 then, immediately after the upgrade, open the Settings dialog and reconfigure your settings.
plugins.author: Mike Foster

plugins.name: Snippets
plugins.description: Adds the possibility to add code snippets to the current document by selecting them from a simple list.
plugins.author: Frank Fesevur

plugins.name: SpeechPlugin
plugins.description: No kidding, Notepad++ speaks now. With SpeechPlugin, you can make Notepad++ dictate your text or source code. Of course, speakers are necessary.
plugins.author: Jim Xochellis

plugins.name: StayAwake
plugins.description: StayAwake enables you to maintain an Active status on Microsoft Teams by simulating key presses of unused or low side-effect buttons at specified intervals. StayAwake also prevents screen saver activation, screen blanking, and Windows session lockouts.
plugins.author: Shridhar Kumar

plugins.name: TakeNotes
plugins.description: Helps people who like to use Notepad++ for jotting quick notes. Instead of using unnamed 'new ?' files, this plugins allows to quickly create new empty files in a folder of choice. The file names may be custom generated using a mask and may contain details such as the user name, date, and time of creation so that unique files may be generated. Additionally, the plugin allows to load exiting notes in the folder of choice, save existing files as a note, and open the last saved note quickly. Please refer to the Options dialog box for more details. It is strongly recommended to use this plugin in combination with AutoSave to make sure that you never loose a note.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: Task List
plugins.description: Automatically scans the open document and adds all "TODO:*" items to your task list, a window pane docked on the right. Double-clicking an item in the list will take you to that line in the code.
plugins.author: blitowitz

plugins.name: TC Syslog Finder
plugins.description: Instantly find and open the latest Teamcenter syslog in Notepad++.
plugins.author: bsagarzazu

plugins.name: TopMost
plugins.description: Allows setting the main Notepad++ window as a topmost window so it can stay on top of other windows even when it is not active. Syncs with Notepad++'s own stay on top functionality and allows to remember the setting between restarts as well as to show a toolbar button.
plugins.author: Franco Stellari

plugins.name: TreeSitter
plugins.description: Integrate Tree-sitter to Notepad++. AST-based syntax highlighting and code folding for many languages.
plugins.author: Tuomas Hietanen

plugins.name: URL Encode/Decode Plugin
plugins.description:
Hopefully a decent URL Encoder and Decoder plug-in for Notepad++ which helps to make developer's life easier by providing facility to encode/decode the URL within Notepad++. 

How it works:
1. Configure setting from menu (Plugins->URL Plugin->URL Plugin Settings). It is not mandatory, but recommended.
2. Select text/URL which you want to encode/decode.
3. Perform your task via Plugins->URL Plugin->Encode/Decode URL.
plugins.author: Rajendra Singh

plugins.name: Virtual Folders
plugins.description: This plugin adds a dockable tree panel where you can create your own virtual folder structure. Group files from different paths, reorder them freely, and keep related resources together without touching the actual filesystem.
plugins.author: Fatih Coşkun

plugins.name: VSCode Keymap NPP
plugins.description:
Ports the stock Windows VS Code shortcuts to Notepad++ as far as Notepad++ can reasonably follow them.
Maps clean Notepad++ or Scintilla equivalents, blocks conflicting fallthrough in strict mode, and keeps the rest documented in the coverage report.
plugins.author: philip

plugins.name: WebEdit
plugins.description:
Speed up your code editing! Enter an abbreviation (tag), press Alt + Enter, and expand the tag into a full code snippet. You can also wrap (surround) a selection e.g. with HTML tags.
- More than 1000 preset tags: HTML (elements, attributes, BootStrap, Smarty, etc.), JavaScript (jQuery), CSS, PHP, SQL (MySQL, Eloquent ORM), etc.
- Automatic or custom caret (cursor) positioning
- Handling new lines, indents, etc.
- Variables: clipboard content, current file name, custom date/time, etc.
- Customizable tags in the plugin menu; assign tags to shortcuts
- Customizable tags in the toolbar
- Tag suggestions (similar tags)
- Easy tag addition
- Multiselect support
- Unicode support
- Over 17 years with Notepad++, now in 64-bit version!
plugins.author: Alexander Iljin
